resources.string: Filora needs access to your photos, videos, audio, and documents so it can show your media categories and let you browse, search, and organize your files. Filora never uploads your files — everything stays on your device.
No problem. You can still browse storage you pick yourself using your device\'s file picker. Grant media access any time from Settings to unlock photo, video, and audio categories.

All-files access lets Filora manage every file on your device, including app folders and downloads. Only enable this if you need to browse or organize files outside your photos, videos, and audio. You can turn it off any time in system settings.
